breakdown: PR ports CR (CodeRabbit) fallback logic to Skeptic Gates - adding status+comment fallback when formal CR review is not available. Improves error handling with explicit exit code checks and pipefail. Weaknesses: no test coverage visible (YAML workflows), worse variable naming (PIPELINE vs RAW), and no typed safety applies to shell/YAML context.
key_changes: Add fallback logic to GATE-3: check CR status (commits API) + approve comment (issues API) when review not APPROVED
Add explicit error handling with set +e/-e and exit code checks for jq pipelines
Support both coderabbitai[bot] and coderabbitai user logins in checks
Apply same changes to skeptic-cron.yml workflow
Relax approve regex from strict anchored to loose matching
